title: Food Pantries * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Food Pantries * Hispanic/Latino Community 3 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community AIDS/HIV At Risk Youth Hispanic/Latino Community Homeless Families Homeless Youth Mental Health Issues Seasonal Workers Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONSEJO HISPANO SEASONAL FOOD BOXES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific food boxes including fresh produce, dried and canned goods, with a focus on Latinx community members. 565 12th Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: December-February Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSEJO HISPANO CONSEJO HISPANO TILLAMOOK SEASONAL FOOD BOXES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific food boxes including fresh produce, dried and canned goods, with a focus on Latinx community members. 110 Stillwell Avenue Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: December-February Email (503) 325-4547 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD EUGENE MAIN OFFICE MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a mobile food pantry. Assists with filling out forms for SNAP and OHP. 195 W 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted; primary focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: 1st and 3rd Friday of the month 10am-noon Email (541) 687-2667 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONSEJO HISPANO SEASONAL FOOD BOXES CONSEJO HISPANO SEASONAL FOOD BOXES PLAZA DE NUESTRA COMUNIDAD MOBILE FOOD PANTY AND BENEFITS ASSISTANCE
